name: bpmn
description: Read, explain, create, and edit BPMN 2.0 process diagrams (.bpmn): plain-language summaries, non-destructive layout that preserves Camunda multi-diagram sub-process pages, full coverage (collaborations, swimlanes, sub-processes, data objects), structural validation, control-flow linting (deadlocks, unreachable nodes, dead ends), plus diff and find.
